payload: {"code":"{\"v\":2,\"language\":\"TS\",\"entry\":\"index.ts\",\"imports\":{},\"files\":{\"index.ts\":\"export const createScene = async function () {\\n    const scene = new BABYLON.Scene(engine);\\n    const camera = new BABYLON.ArcRotateCamera(\\\"cam\\\", -Math.PI / 2, Math.PI / 3, 10, BABYLON.Vector3.Zero(), scene);\\n    camera.attachControl(canvas, true);\\n    new BABYLON.HemisphericLight(\\\"light\\\", new BABYLON.Vector3(0, 1, 0), scene);\\n\\n    // --- 永久屏幕日志系统 ---\\n    const adt = BABYLON.GUI.AdvancedDynamicTexture.CreateFullscreenUI(\\\"UI\\\");\\n    const logStack = new BABYLON.GUI.StackPanel();\\n    logStack.verticalAlignment = BABYLON.GUI.Control.VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_TOP;\\n    logStack.horizontalAlignment = BABYLON.GUI.Control.HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT;\\n    adt.addControl(logStack);\\n\\n    const screenLog = (msg, color = \\\"white\\\") => {\\n        const t = new BABYLON.GUI.TextBlock();\\n        t.text = `> ${msg}`;\\n        t.color = color;\\n        t.height = \\\"30px\\\";\\n        t.fontSize = 18;\\n        t.textHorizontalAlignment = BABYLON.GUI.Control.HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT;\\n        logStack.addControl(t);\\n    };\\n\\n    screenLog(\\\"System: Checking local assets...\\\");\\n\\n    // --- 兼容 TypeScript 的加载写法 ---\\n    // 我们只传 4 个参数：名称、URL、场景、成功回调\\n    // 失败检查我们放在 readyToPlayCallback 之后或者通过 try-catch 逻辑\\n    const coinSound = new BABYLON.Sound(\\\"coin\\\", \\\"./coin.wav\\\", scene, () => {\\n        screenLog(\\\"coin.wav: LOADED ✅\\\", \\\"green\\\");\\n    }, { volume: 1.0 });\\n\\n    const tableSound = new BABYLON.Sound(\\\"table\\\", \\\"./table.wav\\\", scene, () => {\\n        screenLog(\\\"table.wav: LOADED ✅\\\", \\\"green\\\");\\n    }, { volume: 1.0 });\\n\\n    // --- 专门检查是否加载失败的逻辑 ---\\n    scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.addOnce(() => {\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\n            if (!coinSound.isReady) screenLog(\\\"coin.wav: Still NOT Ready (Check Path)\\\", \\\"red\\\");\\n            if (!tableSound.isReady) screenLog(\\\"table.wav: Still NOT Ready (Check Path)\\\", \\\"red\\\");\\n        }, 2000); // 2秒后如果还没加载好，大概率是路径挂了\\n    });\\n\\n    // --- 解锁与交互 ---\\n    const unlockBtn = BABYLON.GUI.Button.CreateSimpleButton(\\\"ub\\\", \\\"CLICK TO ACTIVATE AUDIO\\\");\\n    unlockBtn.width = \\\"300px\\\"; unlockBtn.height = \\\"60px\\\";\\n    unlockBtn.color = \\\"white\\\"; unlockBtn.background = \\\"green\\\";\\n    unlockBtn.verticalAlignment = BABYLON.GUI.Control.VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER;\\n    unlockBtn.onPointerUpObservable.add(() => {\\n        if (BABYLON.Engine.audioEngine) {\\n            BABYLON.Engine.audioEngine.unlock();\\n            screenLog(\\\"AudioContext: Unlocked\\\", \\\"yellow\\\");\\n            unlockBtn.isVisible = false;\\n        }\\n    });\\n    adt.addControl(unlockBtn);\\n\\n    const b1 = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateBox(\\\"gold\\\", {size: 2}, scene);\\n    b1.position.x = -2;\\n    b1.material = new BABYLON.StandardMaterial(\\\"m1\\\", scene);\\n    b1.material.diffuseColor = new BABYLON.Color3(1, 0.8, 0);\\n\\n    const b2 = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateBox(\\\"table\\\", {size: 2}, scene);\\n    b2.position.x = 2;\\n    b2.material = new BABYLON.StandardMaterial(\\\"m2\\\", scene);\\n    b2.material.diffuseColor = new BABYLON.Color3(0.5, 0.5, 0.5);\\n\\n    scene.onPointerObservable.add((info) => {\\n        if (info.type === BABYLON.PointerEventTypes.POINTERDOWN) {\\n            const hit = info.pickInfo.pickedMesh;\\n            const play = (s, name) => {\\n                if (s.isReady) {\\n                    s.setPlaybackRate(0.9 + Math.random() * 0.2);\\n                    s.play();\\n                    screenLog(`Playing: ${name}`, \\\"cyan\\\");\\n                } else {\\n                    screenLog(`Error: ${name} NOT LOADED`, \\\"orange\\\");\\n                }\\n            };\\n            if (hit === b1) play(coinSound, \\\"coin\\\");\\n            if (hit === b2) play(tableSound, \\\"table\\\");\\n        }\\n    });\\n\\n    return scene;\\n};\"}}","unicode":"","engine":"WebGL2","version":2}
name: music test
